plugins.name: reverse-skill
plugins.description: Cybersecurity Skills Router — routes authorized reverse engineering, mobile/APK, JS, binary, CTF, and pentest tasks to the right PRIMARY skill, with scope/auth gate, tool-index bootstrap, and field-journal. Not a pile of 800 micro-skills: one router pack with domain specialists.
